node_key.description: Stable UUID for dependencies and registry; display id may be renumbered.

id.description: Hierarchical display id (e.g. M1.2); may change when outline is reorganized.

sibling_order.description: Sort order among nodes with the same parent_id (lower first). Defaults to 0 when omitted.

planning_dir.description: Repo-relative path to a single Markdown planning sheet under planning/, e.g. planning/M1.1_slug_<node_key>.md; required for types vision, phase, milestone, task, and gate (enforced in validate_roadmap.py). Gate nodes use the gate planning scaffold; other types use the feature-sheet scaffold. See planning/README.md.

goal.description: Concise statement of what this node achieves when complete.

acceptance.description: Observable acceptance criteria — what must be true for this node to be considered done.

risks.description: Known risks or blockers to surface for planning.

decision.description: Architecture or policy decision block for milestones with a pending or resolved fork.

decided_date.description: ISO 8601 date when the decision was made.

adr_ref.description: Path or identifier of the ADR capturing the decision (e.g. docs/adr/ADR-001.md).

rollup_status.description: Derived status rolled up from descendant leaves. Computed on load; never edited directly. Same as 'status' for leaves; for non-leaves, 'Complete' only when all leaf descendants are 'Complete'.
